titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Hurman and Jamil Ibn Darraj

text: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن حمران؛ و جميل بن درّاج فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن محمّد بن حمران؛ و جميل بن درّاج‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Hurman and Jamil ibn Darraj has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Muhammad ibn Hurman and Jamil ibn Darraj.
